---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped improvement aligned with JOG's current direction
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the proposed improvement in one short paragraph.

## Problem

What concrete limitation does this solve today?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the narrowest useful version of the change.

## Why This Fits JOG

Explain how the request fits the current lane:

- internal tools
- line-of-business apps
- form-heavy or CRUD-heavy workflows
- desktop-style browser shells

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any simpler workaround or alternative approach.

## Checks

- [ ] I read `README.md`
- [ ] I read `doc/developer-guide.md`
- [ ] I checked `doc/roadmap.md`
- [ ] This request is framed around implemented or near-term JOG direction, not a generic frontend-framework wish list
